tested_outcome: TWO production-ready variants in the library — same archetype, different funnel positions. Demonstrates pack-aware composition: same archetype produces different ads based on which audience the pack needs to cover.

warm_hot_direct_response.headline: WHY WAIT? GET DUCTED A/C THIS WEEK
warm_hot_direct_response.sub_headline: Whole-home ducted air conditioning, installed in 7 days flat.
warm_hot_direct_response.value_stack: 7-Day Install Guarantee | $0 Upfront | Locally Licensed & Insured | 5-Year Workmanship Guarantee
warm_hot_direct_response.guarantee_badge: FASTEST INSTALL GUARANTEED (top-right circular, tilted, yellow/navy)
warm_hot_direct_response.hero_treatment: Full-bleed family lifestyle photo (mum + kids on couch, evening domestic scene), navy tinted overlay ~15-20%
warm_hot_direct_response.use_when: Audience already understands ducted A/C and is comparing/deciding. Bottom-funnel closer.

cold_warm_explainer.headline: Get Your DUCTED A/C Installed in Just 7 Days!
cold_warm_explainer.headline_accent: 7 Days! in cyan/light-blue accent. 'Installed in Just' on small accent pill.
cold_warm_explainer.sub_headline: Enjoy a cool, comfortable home without the wait.
cold_warm_explainer.value_stack_format: Three stacked detail blocks with mini icons (calendar, card, shield), separated by thin accent dividers: '$58 per week — fully installed' / '$0 upfront, interest-free finance available' / 'Guaranteed installation within 1 week'
cold_warm_explainer.guarantee_badge: FASTEST INSTALL GUARANTEED (orange/white circular, slightly tilted, with stopwatch icon)
cold_warm_explainer.hero_treatment: Right-half lifestyle photo of bright daylit modern living room — couple on green couch with laptop, candid researching moment. NO heavy overlay — keep natural brightness intact.
cold_warm_explainer.explainer_device: Stylised vent fixture at top of right side + curving cyan/light-blue arrows looping from vent down toward the couple — represents airflow visually as graphic device, not photoreal addition. Critical for cold-audience comprehension.
cold_warm_explainer.small_decorative_prop: Potted plant in lower-left corner — adds organic warmth without competing with text
cold_warm_explainer.use_when: Audience is learning about ducted A/C or comparing system types. Top-mid funnel.

lessons_for_layer_2: Photo selection drives ~40% of mood — bright daylight = explainer/cold, evening domestic = direct-response/warm-hot
When briefing photo treatment, explicitly call out the mood the photo should drive
Airflow visualisation as a GRAPHIC DEVICE (not photoreal) is the explainer hero — vent at top + curving arrows looping toward family
Mini-icons in value stack blocks outperform plain text — add visual hierarchy without clutter
Negative-example endings work: 'if the output reads as moody or evening-lit, it has failed' tells the AI exactly what to avoid

Pack-aware composition: when A2 fires, check the pack — if pack is heavy on warm/hot, generate cold/warm variant. If pack is heavy on cold/warm, generate warm/hot variant. Photo selection is the primary lever.
MANDATORY guarantee badge is non-negotiable — top-right corner, circular, tilted, high-contrast, with optional icon
full_prompt_used:
You are being given two attached images:

IMAGE 1 (reference ad): Use this as a strong style and layout reference. Match its energetic family-friendly feel, the bright airy mood, and the position/structure of the guarantee badge — but DO NOT copy its headline, family, or specific colours. Generate fresh ones per the brief below.

IMAGE 2 (lifestyle photo): Use this image AS-IS as the hero. Place it filling the right half (or majority) of the canvas. Apply only a very light tinted overlay (~5-10% opacity) — keep the photo's natural brightness intact. Do not modify the people in the photo. The bright airy daylight feel of this photo should drive the whole ad's mood.

Create a square 1080×1080 social media ad for a residential ducted air conditioning installer on the Gold Coast, Australia.

FUNNEL CONTEXT
This ad is for a cold/warm audience — buyers who may still be learning about ducted A/C and need both education AND the speed promise. The job is to show what's possible quickly: "your home could feel like this — this week." Brighter, more aspirational, more informational than a hard direct-response closer.

CRITICAL CLARITY RULE
A scroller must understand within ONE SECOND that this ad is for DUCTED AIR CONDITIONING with a fast install promise. Both must be unmissable.

MOOD & STYLE
Bright, airy, optimistic, family-friendly. Light/cool palette — soft blues, whites, with one accent colour for the speed promise. Choose the specific palette and typography fresh per generation. Should feel like a modern home brochure or premium real-estate ad — not a discount retailer flyer, not a moody direct-response ad. Generous breathing room. Clean lines. Aspirational but achievable.

LAYOUT (left half / right half split)

LEFT HALF — text-led, on a clean light background

1. HEADLINE — upper-left
Stacked headline reading exactly: "Get Your Ducted A/C Installed in Just 7 Days!"
Mix of weights:
   - "Get Your" in medium-weight regular case
   - "Ducted A/C" oversized bold uppercase — dominant element of the headline
   - "Installed in Just" in medium-weight, smaller, possibly on a small accent colour pill
   - "7 Days!" oversized bold in a contrasting accent colour (cyan/light-blue works well) — the speed promise visual signature

2. SUB-HEADLINE — beneath the headline
Italic medium-weight: "Enjoy a cool, comfortable home without the wait."

3. VALUE STACK — beneath the sub-headline
Three stacked detail blocks (not tick-bullets — short paragraphs separated by thin accent dividers), readable at thumbnail size:
   - "$58 per week — fully installed"
   - "$0 upfront, interest-free finance available"
   - "Guaranteed installation within 1 week"

(Note: do NOT write "0% interest" — use "interest-free finance" instead.)

4. SMALL DECORATIVE PROP — lower-left corner
A small decorative plant or home accent prop at the lower-left edge, partially cropped, adds organic warmth without competing with the text. Can be a potted plant, woven basket, or similar.

RIGHT HALF — visual hero

5. LIFESTYLE PHOTO + AIRFLOW VISUALISATION
Place the attached lifestyle photo as the hero on the right side, full-height. Above and around the family, add a SUBTLE airflow visualisation — think: a thin curving cyan/light-blue arrow or arc that loops down from a ceiling area toward the family, suggesting cool air flowing into the room. Optional: a stylised vent fixture at the very top of the right side (small, simplified — not photorealistic) that the airflow appears to emerge from. The visualisation is a graphic device, not a photoreal addition.

6. GUARANTEE BADGE — top-right corner, MANDATORY
Circular badge, slightly tilted (5-10 degrees), high-contrast colour. Two-line text inside:
   - Top arc: "FASTEST INSTALL"
   - Bottom arc: "GUARANTEED"
Optional small percentage in the centre if a promo is active (e.g. "40% off"). Sized large enough to read at thumbnail — the archetype's defining element, not a decorative footnote.

BOTTOM STRIP

7. BRAND LOGOS
Thin horizontal strip at the very bottom edge with three brand logos evenly spaced and rendered in their native brand colours: Daikin, Fujitsu, Hisense. Use the real brand logos.

GLOBAL HARD RULES
- 1080×1080 aspect ratio (square), nothing else
- Use the lifestyle photo AS PROVIDED — do not modify the people, do not regenerate faces
- Maintain ~60px safe-zone padding inside all four edges — no headlines, badges, CTAs, or critical text within this margin. Brand strip may sit close to but not touching the bottom edge.
- All text readable at thumbnail size on mobile — every label and value-stack item must be clearly legible
- Maximum 3 brand logos
- Do NOT include the words "0% interest" anywhere — "interest-free finance available" is the acceptable phrasing
- Do NOT add review badges or star ratings to this ad
- Do NOT include any dates, names, or specific identifying details
- The guarantee badge is MANDATORY — circular, tilted, high-contrast, clearly readable
- The product category "DUCTED A/C" / "DUCTED AIR CONDITIONING" must be unmissable in the headline area
- The airflow visualisation must read as a graphic device, NOT a photoreal addition to the photo
- Bright airy mood overall — if the output reads as moody or evening-lit, it has failed
